title: Employment Rights: What is the maximum amount of severance pay for an...
summary: Determine the maximum severance pay or notice period entitlement based on years of service.
prompt: What is the maximum amount of severance pay for an employee who has worked for 10 years?

options.text: Cannot be determined from the given information
According to Quebec law, an employee who has worked for 10 years is entitled to

solution: According to Quebec law, an employee who has worked for 10 years is entitled to a maximum of 8 weeks' notice or severance pay upon termination. This provision ensures that long-serving employees receive adequate compensation for their loyalty and service.
